## Checklist
- [ ] `cargo build --release` is clean
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] I have read and agree to the contribution terms in [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) — I grant the maintainer a perpetual, irrevocable right to use and **relicense** my contribution (including assignment of copyright where the law allows it).
